message:
Refine dark mode styling with visual hierarchy and design improvements

Implemented visual hierarchy in dark mode by using distinct background
colors: nav/sidebar use neutral-800 (darkest), main content uses a custom
color 2% lighter (#12161f). Removed borders between panels in favor of
background differentiation and added a rounded corner at the nav/sidebar
junction.

Enhanced TOC styling with an "On this page" heading and icon, moved the
vertical line indicator to the outermost level, and added an active
indicator line using primary-500 color.

Updated footer to use --sl-color-bg for consistent theming and inset the
separator line from edges. Fixed dark mode SVG inversion by correcting
the CSS selector rule and moving the inline-svg class to the SVG
container in InteractiveDocsStructure component.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
